name: image_processing
description: Ability to capture, resize, and manipulate image files
instructions_md: For image capture: use web_screenshot for web content (headless, no display needed), use take_screenshot for capturing the physical screen or a region. For resizing: use image_resize — provide either width or height and set the other to 0 to maintain aspect ratio. Common output formats: PNG for lossless, JPEG for photos (use quality=85). Always verify the returned width and height after resizing to confirm the operation succeeded.
